cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Analyst / QA Engineer role at MIMO. I noticed you are looking for someone to improve automation coverage and troubleshoot software issues. My background in developing core features and automating complex workflows fits this focus.

I currently maintain a software product in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. This experience taught me how to identify bottlenecks and ensure system reliability before a product reaches the user.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform. It uses a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and an AI agent to process market data. I am used to building and testing systems where data accuracy and software stability are critical. 

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I would like to bring my automation skills to the MIMO engineering team to help maintain your quality standards.

Aodren Gloux
